sections.paragraph:
properly inf. of the verb חָזַק-

(1) כְּתֶזְקָתֹו 2Ch 12:1 26:16 , “in his being strong,” when he had become strong.

(2) Isa 8:11, בְּחֶזְקַת־הַיָּד “in the hand (of God) being strong,” i.e. impelling me, being impelled by the Spirit of God, comp. the verb, Eze 3:14 Jer 20:7.

(3) Dan 11:2, כְּחֶזְקָתֹו בְעָשְׁרֹו “in his being strong in his riches,” i.e. confiding in them.
